content_schedule_window_check.name: content_schedule_window_check
content_schedule_window_check.value: "content"."unpublish_at" IS NULL OR "content"."publish_at" IS NULL OR "content"."unpublish_at" > "content"."publish_at"

content_revisions_schedule_window_check.name: content_revisions_schedule_window_check
content_revisions_schedule_window_check.value: "content_revisions"."unpublish_at" IS NULL OR "content_revisions"."publish_at" IS NULL OR "content_revisions"."unpublish_at" > "content_revisions"."publish_at"

success_message.name: success_message
success_message.default: 'Thank you. Your submission has been received.'

galleries_origin_metadata_check.name: galleries_origin_metadata_check
galleries_origin_metadata_check.value: ("galleries"."origin" = 'manual' AND "galleries"."origin_type" IS NULL AND "galleries"."origin_id" IS NULL) OR ("galleries"."origin" <> 'manual')

webshop_carts_owner_check.name: webshop_carts_owner_check
webshop_carts_owner_check.value: "webshop_carts"."customer_user_id" IS NOT NULL OR "webshop_carts"."anonymous_token_hash" IS NOT NULL

webshop_coupons_dates_check.name: webshop_coupons_dates_check
webshop_coupons_dates_check.value: "webshop_coupons"."ends_at" IS NULL OR "webshop_coupons"."starts_at" IS NULL OR "webshop_coupons"."ends_at" > "webshop_coupons"."starts_at"

webshop_digital_assets_file_source_check.name: webshop_digital_assets_file_source_check
webshop_digital_assets_file_source_check.value: "webshop_digital_assets"."asset_file_id" IS NOT NULL OR "webshop_digital_assets"."file_id" IS NOT NULL

webshop_license_keys_assignment_check.name: webshop_license_keys_assignment_check
webshop_license_keys_assignment_check.value: ("webshop_license_keys"."status" <> 'assigned') OR ("webshop_license_keys"."order_id" IS NOT NULL AND "webshop_license_keys"."order_item_id" IS NOT NULL AND "webshop_license_keys"."assigned_at" IS NOT NULL)
